summary: Iteration 26: Restored Version Testing - Backend 100% PASS (12/12), Frontend PASS with 1 data migration issue

issues: Google Maps RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (known issue from iteration_24)

backend_api_tests: GET /api/auth/me - returns user with valid token
Provider user gets auth/me data correctly
frontend_ui_tests: Home page loads correctly with search form
Login page loads with email/password form
Dashboard shows user info, subscription status, care requests
NO role switcher button in navbar (multi-role removed)
NO 'Cambiar a' button in user menu (multi-role removed)
Service type filters visible (Todos, Paseo, Cuidado, Daycare)

action_items: DATA FIX REQUIRED: User 'cuidador@test.com' has role='client' in database (set by previous multi-role system). Need to update to role='provider' for correct /provider/dashboard redirect after login.
Optionally clean up leftover multi-role fields (roles array, active_role) from users collection
critical_code_review_comments: The restored code is correct - Login.jsx checks user.role === 'provider' || user.provider for redirect
Data mismatch: cuidador@test.com user has role='client' but should be role='provider'
Database users may have leftover 'roles' and 'active_role' fields from multi-role feature
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 - Restored version from ucan-main-5.zip. Multi-role system removed. Key findings: 1) All auth APIs working. 2) switch-role and add-role endpoints correctly return 404. 3) Navbar has NO role switcher button. 4) Search page shows 18 providers. 5) DATA ISSUE: cuidador@test.com has role='client' instead of 'provider' - needs DB update. 6) Google Maps still has RefererNotAllowedMapError (external config issue).

known_issues.google_maps: RefererNotAllowedMapError - API key domain restriction (external config, not code bug)
known_issues.cuidador_user_role: cuidador@test.com has role='client' in DB, causing redirect to /dashboard instead of /provider/dashboard. Need DB fix: db.users.updateOne({email:'cuidador@test.com'}, {$set:{role:'provider'}})
